name: AI Agent Posture
description: What's running, what it can touch, what it has scripted. Identifies AI coding tools (Cursor / Claude Code / Codex / Copilot) by their launch agents + installed binaries, reports their effective TCC scope, and surfaces any AppleScript runtime activity those tools have triggered.

plugins.role: Identify AI tools by their launchd helpers + RunAtLoad flags
Effective TCC scope: which AI tools have FDA, Accessibility, Screen Recording, etc.
Recent AppleScript activity — AI agents often automate other apps via osascript
Cross-reference: AI tools whose persistence + TCC combination is unusual
